item.title: Archer v1.0.9
item.description:
v1.0.9

  • SSH workspaces — File → New SSH Workspace… / ⌘P pins a workspace to a remote host; tabs and agents launch via archer-ssh; paste uploads to the remote first.
  • Keep-awake — Off / Auto / Always dial (closed-lid helper with one-time admin auth).
  • Crash black box — Dock launches write stderr to ~/Library/Logs/archer/stderr.log.
  • Git repo status pill — open forge / copy URL / Reveal in Finder; status-bar menu load fix.
  • Privacy usage descriptions — child processes can prompt for calendar, contacts, camera, etc.

item.title: Archer v1.0.7
item.description:
v1.0.7

  • ai-workflow Skill Marketplace — second discover source: 168 skills across 6 workflow groups, local filtering, installs and update checks wired through the existing pipeline.
  • One-Click Worktree Tabs — branch side-button on agent rows in the + menu opens the agent in a fresh auto-named git worktree.
  • Usage Parser Protocol + Gemini — native collectors behind a UsageParser protocol; new parser for stock gemini-cli session shards.
  • Grok full integration — lifecycle + tool-call hooks, session resume, Ask Grok.
